feat_support_desc: Our team is here to help you anytime.
feat_main_desc: We've built a platform that prioritizes trust, quality, and speed. No more searching through classifieds.

ai_book_best_pro: Book the best pro for this

categories_desc: Select a service to see available professionals near you.
top_rated_desc: Highly recommended professionals in your area.
pricing_desc: Transparent pricing for both homeowners and artisans. No hidden fees, no surprises.
pricing_homeowners_desc: Find and book the best artisans for your home projects.
pricing_artisans_desc: Grow your business and reach more clients in your city.
pricing_trust_1_desc: What you see is what you pay. No subscription fees or surprise charges.
pricing_trust_2_desc: We use industry-standard encryption to keep your financial data safe.
pricing_trust_3_desc: If you're not satisfied with the service, we offer mediation and refunds.
become_ar_desc: Join Morocco's largest network of verified professionals. Get more clients, manage your bookings, and build your reputation.
become_ar_ben_1_desc: Get access to thousands of homeowners looking for your specific skills.
become_ar_ben_2_desc: Work when you want, where you want. You are your own boss.
become_ar_ben_3_desc: Guaranteed payments for your hard work through our platform.
become_ar_process_1_desc: Fill out our simple application form with your details and expertise.
become_ar_process_2_desc: We review your documents and conduct a background check.
become_ar_process_3_desc: Once approved, your profile goes live and you can start accepting jobs.
become_ar_cta_desc: Join thousands of successful artisans today.
become_ar_ben_4_desc: Collect verified reviews and become the top-rated pro in your city.
become_ar_ben_5_desc: Manage bookings, chat with clients, and track earnings on the go.
become_ar_ben_6_desc: Access training, certification programs, and exclusive tool discounts.
become_ar_step_1_desc: Sign up and tell us about your skills, experience, and location.
become_ar_step_2_desc: Upload your ID and certifications. We verify every pro for trust.
become_ar_step_3_desc: Receive booking requests and start growing your business.
become_ar_faq_1_a: No, joining M3allem En Click is completely free. We only take a small commission on successful bookings.
become_ar_faq_2_a: Payments are processed through our secure system and transferred directly to your bank account or wallet.
become_ar_faq_3_a: You will need a valid National ID (CIN) and any professional certifications or licenses you have.
become_ar_faq_4_a: Yes! You have full control over your availability. You can work as much or as little as you want.

find_ar_no_pros_desc: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

home_new_feat1_desc: Every artisan is thoroughly vetted for quality and reliability.
home_new_feat2_desc: Schedule services immediately with real-time availability.
home_new_feat3_desc: Experience top-tier craftsmanship and exceptional service.
services_desc: Everything you need to build, maintain, and improve your home. Book trusted professionals in minutes.

services_cleaning_desc: Deep cleaning, post-construction cleanup, and regular home maintenance.
services_ac_desc: AC installation, maintenance, gas refilling, and cooling system repairs.
services_construction_desc: Masonry, tiling, renovation work, and small-scale construction projects.
services_carpentry_desc: Furniture repair, custom cabinets, door installations, and woodwork.
services_gardening_desc: Landscaping, lawn maintenance, plant care, and garden design.
services_cta_desc: Find the perfect professional for your next project today.

footer_slogan: The most trusted marketplace for professional artisans in Morocco. Quality work, guaranteed.
footer_rights: © 2026 M3allem En Click. All rights reserved.
about_subtitle: M3allem En Click was born from a simple idea: connecting homeowners with the best professional artisans in Morocco through a trusted, digital platform.
about_mission_desc_1: We aim to empower local artisans by giving them the tools to grow their business while providing homeowners with a safe, reliable, and convenient way to get quality work done.
about_mission_desc_2: By combining traditional craftsmanship with modern technology, we're building a more transparent and efficient home services ecosystem in Morocco.
about_values_trust_desc: We verify every artisan and homeowner to ensure a safe environment for everyone.
about_values_quality_desc: We stand behind the quality of work provided by our professional network.
about_values_innovation_desc: We use technology to simplify complex processes and improve user experience.
about_values_community_desc: We support local talent and help build stronger professional communities.
about_values_transparency_desc: Clear pricing, honest reviews, and open communication are our core.
about_values_customer_desc: Our users are at the heart of everything we do. We're here to help.
contact_subtitle: Have questions or need assistance? Our team is here to help you with anything you need.
contact_faq_1_q: How do I become an artisan?
contact_faq_1_a: You can apply through our 'Become an Artisan' page. We'll review your application and documents to verify your expertise.
contact_faq_2_q: Is the platform free for clients?
contact_faq_2_a: Yes, joining and browsing is completely free. You only pay for the services you book.
contact_faq_3_q: What if I have an issue with a service?
contact_faq_3_a: Our support team is available to help resolve any disputes. We ensure all issues are handled fairly and promptly.
contact_faq_chat: Chat with us via email or phone.
hiw_subtitle: M3allem En Click makes it easy to find, book, and pay for professional home services in Morocco. Here's how our platform works for you.
hiw_ho_s1_desc: Browse through verified artisans by category, location, and rating.
hiw_ho_s2_desc: Select a professional and book a time that works for you.
hiw_ho_s3_desc: The artisan arrives and completes the job to your satisfaction.
hiw_ho_s4_desc: Pay securely through the app and leave a review for the artisan.
hiw_ar_s1_desc: Set up your professional profile and showcase your skills.
hiw_ar_s2_desc: Complete our verification process to build trust with clients.
hiw_ar_s3_desc: Receive and manage booking requests directly on your phone.
hiw_ar_s4_desc: Build your reputation and increase your earnings over time.
hiw_f1_desc: All transactions are protected. Money is held securely until the job is done.
hiw_f2_desc: Every artisan on our platform goes through a strict background check.
hiw_f3_desc: Communicate directly with your artisan or client through our secure chat.
hiw_f4_desc: Track the status of your booking and the artisan's arrival time.
hiw_trust_desc: We've built several layers of protection to ensure every interaction on M3allem En Click is safe and reliable.
hiw_t_id_verif_desc: Every artisan must provide a valid ID and certifications.
hiw_t_escrow_desc: Payments are held securely until the work is completed.
hiw_t_reviews_desc: Only customers who have booked can leave reviews.
hiw_t_mediation_desc: Our team is here to help resolve any disputes.
careers_subtitle: Help us build the future of home services in Morocco. We're looking for passionate individuals to join our mission.
careers_culture_inn_desc: We solve complex problems with creative solutions and modern technology.
careers_culture_com_desc: We're building more than just an app; we're building a community.
careers_culture_exc_desc: We strive for excellence in everything we do, from code to customer support.
careers_no_jobs_desc: We're always looking for talented people. Send us your resume and we'll reach out when a suitable position opens up.
